microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by **30%** and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model aligned to cloud deployment best practices.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation standard across sovereign and commercial cloud environments.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, coordinating solution design and stakeholder communication across engineering and business teams.

Scaled team leverage through AI-driven automation by building an internal AI agent and restructuring planning workflows, cutting planning cycle time by **39%** and increasing drill capacity by 21% without additional headcount.

Delivered technical briefings and solution demos to executive and engineering audiences, translating complex resilience architectures into clear business-value narratives that accelerated **partner integration** decisions across cloud, storage, and ERP ecosystems.
microsoft_2023: Championed product adoption for **AI-driven code generation** workflows, conducting user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key Azure service teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly through intelligent workflow automation.

Influenced the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating 11+ structured user interviews with Azure service teams, identifying critical feature gaps and translating findings into prioritized, JD-aligned solution requirements.

Optimized data integrity and retrieval by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, cutting lookup time by 83% and improving self-service access to technical content across teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams with competing deployment roadmaps.

Mobilized a product strategy to reduce operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort** per region and building a roadmap to automate the highest-impact critical paths.

Enabled leadership to target automation gaps and prioritize high-value work by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, turning raw process data into actionable spatial and workflow insights.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating solution deployment across IT, Operations, and Engineering stakeholders.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process across a distributed robotics engineering team.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable integration model for future fleet-scale rollouts.

Designed and presented technical solution briefings to cross-functional stakeholders, translating complex infrastructure migration dependencies into clear deployment strategies that secured buy-in and **accelerated execution timelines**.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end sales operations and managing scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals through a redesigned CRM process that improved pipeline visibility and close rates.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the company website and Google Business profile to surface higher-intent leads in local search.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and delivering data-driven recommendations that were incorporated into forward pricing strategy.

tailoring_notes: 'Solution design' and 'technical consulting' from the JD Requirements section woven into microsoft_ft bullet#4 and amazon_robotics bullet#4 to mirror Esri's pre-sales SE framing.
'Cloud computing' and 'cloud deployment' JD terms embedded in microsoft_ft bullets #2 and #3 to align with Esri's ArcGIS-in-cloud and IT-context requirement.
'Partner integration' (JD recommended: BI, CRM, ERP integrations) surfaced explicitly in microsoft_ft bullet#6 referencing cloud, storage, and ERP ecosystems.
'Business value' and 'critical challenges' JD language used in microsoft_ft bullet#6 and amazon_robotics bullet#3 to echo Esri's 'GIS brings business value' framing.
